payload.query: In recent years, area studies approaches to comparative politics have come under attack by proponents of large-N, cross-national approaches. Evaluate the role of area studies in comparative politics and address the challenge posed by cross-national approaches. Are area studies dead? Should they be? Make specific reference to one or more regions of the world.

articles.title: Read the Decision
articles.abstract: A federal judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration from ending Temporary Protected Status for more than 350,000 Haitians in the United States.
articles.snippet: A federal judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration from ending Temporary Protected Status for more than 350,000 Haitians in the United States.

articles.title: Read the document
articles.abstract: In a 220-page report to FEMA last year, Kerr County said a flood was likely within a year, and could exceed historical records.
articles.snippet: In a 220-page report to FEMA last year, Kerr County said a flood was likely within a year, and could exceed historical records.

articles.title: Read the Full ‘Make America Healthy Again’ Report
articles.abstract: The White House released an expansive report that blames a crisis of chronic disease in children on ultraprocessed foods, chemical exposures, lack of physical activity, stress and excessive use of prescription drugs.

articles.title: Scientists Decry ‘Political Attack’ on Reference Manual for Judges

articles.title: Growing Up With A.I.: A Multimedia Challenge for Teenagers and Educators

articles.title: Arab Leaders Condemn Remarks by U.S. Ambassador to Israel
articles.abstract: The ambassador, Mike Huckabee, seemed to endorse Israeli control of lands stretching from Egypt to Iraq. He said his comments were taken out of context.
articles.snippet: The ambassador, Mike Huckabee, seemed to endorse Israeli control of lands stretching from Egypt to Iraq. He said his comments were taken out of context.
